title: rosa minuta
intro: Rosa minuta, also known as Dwarf Rose or Small Rose, is a low-growing, perennial herb native to the Himalayan region. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa minuta include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Rosa minuta can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
